basics.name: Amgad Madkour
basics.label: Engineering Leader
basics.summary: Engineering leader with extensive experience building and shipping AI-powered products at scale. Deep expertise in Artificial Intelligence, Knowledge Graphs, Data Management, and Data Integration. Proven track record of building and leading high-performing teams from the ground up, driving roadmap alignment across organizations, and delivering measurable outcomes on products serving millions of users. Currently serving as the Designated Responsible Individual (DRI) for Microsoft Copilot Commerce, leading engineering and partnering with Product and Design to drive the charter and ensure successful mission execution.

work.name: Microsoft
highlights: Leading engineering architecture and execution for Microsoft Copilot Commerce Savings, owning the platforms for product tracking (including price alerts) and coupons while delivering features including cashback to millions of users across Web, Mobile, and Edge.
Built a team from scratch, owning full hiring, role definition, leveling, promotions, and performance management across engineers and applied scientists.
Doubled product tracking growth within six months; introduced reliability standards and quality gates that improved platform stability.

Drove growth for the Microsoft Autos Marketplace by spearheading multiple initiatives including Autos Entities platform, Autos Copilot, and My Garage contributing to 3× DAU growth and 100% YoY revenue growth.

work.name: Microsoft
highlights: Fine-tuned ML models for product information extraction on Microsoft Edge, improving accuracy and production reliability.
Cut computation and storage costs for entity matching workflows by 50% through indexing and candidate generation optimizations.
Scaled the Bing Satori entity matching platform on Apache Spark, pioneering the adoption of .NET for Spark as a computation framework within the Bing stack.
Designed a graph representation linking entities to news articles, powering downstream annotation and entity linking services.

work.name: IBM
highlights: Co-invented a patented k-partite graph technique for tag recommendation during resource bookmarking.
Developed a spam detection system for social bookmarking using semantic features evaluated across multiple ML algorithms.
Built an unsupervised biomedical system (Bionoculars) for extracting protein-protein interactions from scientific literature.
Built a machine-assisted human translation system (MAHT) leveraging language models for statistical machine translation.
Collaborated with IBM Watson lab (Yorktown) on creating an unstructured information management platform for knowledge discovery from news.
